subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath been equitable in the Cause of God and hath spoken forth the truth when the Desired One came with sovereignty over all who dwell on earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن انصف فی امر الله و نطق بالحق اذ اتی المقصود بسلطان غلب من فی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @the golden rule; regard for one's neighbor; doing unto others, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
